chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Reward of Visiting the Prophet {saws} and the Imams {a.s}, Peace Be Upon Them All

text: 3184 - وَ رَوَى اَلْبَزَنْطِيُّ عَنِ اَلرِّضَا عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : «مَا زَارَنِي أَحَدٌ مِنْ أَوْلِيَائِي عَارِفاً بِحَقِّي إِلاَّ شُفِّعْتُ فِيهِ يَوْمَ اَلْقِيَامَةِ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3184 - Al-Bazanti narrated from Imam Ali ibn Musa Ar-Ridha (as) who said:
"No one among my followers visits me, recognizing my right, except that I will intercede for them on the Day of Judgment."
